positive: A maximalist, high-contrast graphic design featuring a stylized celestial fauna motif. The composition is strictly centered and highly symmetrical. Main elements include intertwined cosmic flora (luminescent vines, moon petals) and graceful mythological creatures (a stylized griffin and a leaping lunar fox). Use a deep midnight blue and rich gold palette, accented by pops of electric magenta. The artwork must mimic a detailed, modern etch-style illustration, combining elements of Art Nouveau and neo-traditional tattoo flash art. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes, thick outlines, and dramatic chiaroscuro lighting that makes the elements pop against a solid, deep background. Vector art quality, perfect for apparel sublimation printing.
negative: blurry, lowres, watermark, text, signatures, cartoon, sketch, grainy, messy, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, bad edges, artifacts, noise
